_comment_instructions: Copy this file to an ISO 639-1 language code such as de.json. Translate the empty values only; do not rename keys beginning without _comment.
_comment_shortcuts: Keep keyboard shortcuts such as Ctrl+O, F5, N, P, T, D, I and F11 unchanged inside translated labels.
_comment_time: Clock labels. Keep the numeric durations and AM/PM meaning intact.
_comment_date: Date labels. Translate YYYY/DD/MM letter notation if customary, but preserve the displayed component order and separators.
_comment_appearance: Display appearance, color, brightness and glow labels.
_comment_general: Language names should be written in the target language. Alien Tech and GitHub are proper names and should not be translated.
